# Thank you, Thank you, Thank you!

Yesterday, I asked you to dig deep and help us reach our monthly fundraising goal.

I am so happy and humbled to tell you that we exceeded this goal.

My opponent is raising money from the Democrat Party and far-left PAC's. My campaign is raising money from Montanans.

But, we're still getting outraised.

Please let your friends and family know that we are working hard and need their support to help us keep up this momentum and get across the finish line.

Again, Thank you!

-Troy

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Like every other presidential election, 2020 is going to be won state-by-state. |
---
Peter,

From the outset of this campaign, we've told you that Donald Trump is going to be a difficult opponent to beat.

And we've never tried to shield this team from a challenge because we know in the face of uncertainty, our grassroots supporters have always risen to the occasion.

**That 's why we're directly sending you this tight battleground states poll from CNN, and **[asking for $25 to our Battleground States Fund to grow this narrow lead:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.01_B4_battleground_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.01_B4_battleground_X__F1_S2_C1__full") **CNN POLL -- BATTLEGROUND STATES**
Joe Biden -- 49%
Donald Trump -- 48% Remember, Peter, the last two Republicans to win the presidency entered the White House without winning the popular vote: George W. Bush and Donald Trump.

Like every other presidential election, 2020 is going to be won state-by-state. And we should prepare for a competitive Electoral College result.

That's why raising into our Battleground States Fund is so important, and as a resident of Pennsylvania, your own backyard is an Electoral College battleground and a critical part of our path to 270 electoral votes! [Can you chip in $25 to help us win in Pennsylvania? | [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b17d/1cd0ac28/156edb822/3570d923/3914574852/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Bill Knows Business - We Need Him In The Senate
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-ji/) September 1, 2020 **Hagerty Has The Business Experience We Need** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-r/) Team Hagerty released a digital video last week, highlighting Bill Hagerty's economic experience. As a businessman and the former chief economic leader in Tennessee, Bill understands what turning around an economy takes. As our Senator, he will work to promote low taxes and a positive business environment in Tennessee and work with President Trump, Senator Blackburn and Tennessee's Republican leadership to get our economy back on track and continue to expand our state's economy for years to come. You can watch the full video [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-y/) **ICYMI: Bring Our Supply Chains Home** Last week, Bill released his latest editorial in _Townhall._ Under Bill's leadership as Tennessee's Commissioner of Economic and Community Development, tens of thousands of new jobs were created, lowering Tennessee's unemployment rate from high above the national average to far below the national average. Bill understands what it takes to get our economy going again and that starts with bringing our supply chains back onshore. Read the full editorial [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-j/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and stand up to the radical liberals who want to push America toward a socialist state. **Are You Registered To Vote?** Early voting begins in only 43 days! Make sure you're registered to vote and are ready to support President Trump and Team Hagerty in the election this November. You can register and find out more information on your polling location [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-t/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-i/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-d/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-h/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Fox Business:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-k/) WATCH: Tennessee Senate candidate Bill Hagerty discusses primary victory, Democrats' radical agenda****[Breitbart:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-u/) Bill Hagerty: Make 'Made in the USA' the Theme of America Again

[WVLT:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-o/) Catching Up With the Candidates: Bill Hagerty****[Knox News Sentinel:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-m/) Schools -- especially colleges -- should play football this fall | Opinion**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-c/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-v/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-yu/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-jl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pudktid-fuutjhhtj-jt/)

September 1, 2020 Hagerty Has The Business Experience We Need Team Hagerty released a digital video last week, highlighting Bill Hagerty's economic experience. As a businessman and the former chief economic leader in Tennessee, Bill understands what turning around an economy takes. As our Senator, he will work to promote low taxes and a positive business environment in Tennessee and work with President Trump, Senator Blackburn and Tennessee's Republican leadership to get our economy back on track and continue to expand our state's economy for years to come. You can watch the full video ICYMI: Bring Our Supply Chains Home Last week, Bill released his latest editorial in Townhall. Under Bill's leadership as Tennessee's Commissioner of Economic and Community Development, tens of thousands of new jobs were created, lowering Tennessee's unemployment rate from high above the national average to far below the national average. Bill understands what it takes to get our economy going again and that starts with bringing our supply chains back onshore. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. name: Zachary Meunier
subject: Everything Iowans reject about Washington-style politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/jVE7ybeziYHtuJgcZthd6_Tp1xwP7qnQzKE5hZRv09s=/og3O8lsv31PYNZm-LPs4VqB_MKo6WxVuti0ihFJNWMw=?refcode=200902-email) Peter, Our opponent, Mariannette Miller-Meeks, and her DC backers just launched a misleading ad claiming that Rita is "playing politics" with coronavirus... by opposing the privatization of Medicaid and cuts to children's health insurance. (WTH?!?) **[We need to set the record straight! Help us correct the record and let Iowans know that Rita is working hard to protect our health care and stand up to this silly attack by donating $20 today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/jVE7ybeziYHtuJgcZthd6_Tp1xwP7qnQzKE5hZRv09s=/og3O8lsv31PYNZm-LPs4VqB_MKo6WxVuti0ihFJNWMw=?refcode=200902-email&amount=20)** We have the receipts on this one. Our opponent was in office during the onset of the Coronavirus pandemic and pushed unproven treatment, ignored social distancing recommendations, scoffed when called out for not wearing a mask and voted to let bad actors off the hook for their negligence to take precautions to protect Iowans' health. So now she's lying about Rita to cover up her own record. This kind of negative campaigning is exactly what we Iowans are sick of in Washington. Look, as rural Iowans, Rita and Paul see plenty of bull. That's why we need them in Washington - and why we need your help. **[We need your donations today to respond to these blatantly false attacks. If you're ready for an honest, level headed leader who is listening to every voice in her district please make a donation to Rita Hart's campaign today. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/jVE7ybeziYHtuJgcZthd6_Tp1xwP7qnQzKE5hZRv09s=/og3O8lsv31PYNZm-LPs4VqB_MKo6WxVuti0ihFJNWMw=?refcode=200902-email)** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: _ | ****[CONTRIBUTE $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/jVE7ybeziYHtuJgcZthd6_Tp1xwP7qnQzKE5hZRv09s=/og3O8lsv31PYNZm-LPs4VqB_MKo6WxVuti0ihFJNWMw=?refcode=200902-email&amount=5&express_lanes=true)****

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. subject: Judge Throws Out Walz Lawsuit
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Never put liberty in the hands of the courts - they're full of robed gangsters.** The lawsuit filed by legislators and businesses in the Ramsey County court was thrown out last night by Judge Gilligan, a Dayton appointee. He found that Walz was acting in accordance with the law and Constitution when shutting down our economy! Now the real pain is going to set in. Restaurants that adapted to the government orders by serving patrons outside, are going to suffer as the weather starts cooling down. We just learned a popular restaurant in Rep Rob Ecklund's district is the most recent victim of Walz' shutdown aftermath. Another permanent closure. Schools are starting up again...kind of. Parents are about to feel the strain of the hybrid model where kids go to school only a couple days a week, while they have to scramble to find child care the other days. A small spike in COVID cases and those schools will go right back to the ineffective distance learning model. **To this day, we are still being ordered by Walz to not have mass gatherings. Celebrations like the Minnesota State Fair, Oktoberfest and other large gatherings have been canceled this fall. Meanwhile, Walz and Democrat leadership praise the lawless rioting & looting, I mean "protesting", of BLM/Antifa.** Challenge Walz' illegal orders and you are likely to find yourself in court or paying large fines. Tyrant-in-Making Walz went after Kris Schiffler back in May for opening his restaurant early. In July, he went after the North Star Stampede rodeo. And we learned this past week that the Walz' administration will be ramping up compliance checks throughout the state. Is this the Minnesota you want to live in? Action 4 Liberty has vowed to continue the fight against Walz by passing the resolution to strip him of his emergency powers. Our next battle is coming up in the September Special Session. The best chance we have to end his powers is up at the Capitol. We still need 5 Democrats to flip their vote and now is when we make them feel the pain, instead of us. **We're taking our message directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them!** [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=2) Walz is abusing his emergency powers and politicians like Brad Tabke are protecting him. **Equip us with the resources to alert voters in Brad Tabke's district from now until election day that Tabke is killing small business and infringing on our liberties by protecting Tim Walz.**
## [EQUIP ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=3)
The Legislature will be back in session soon and we can't afford to not put**maximum pressure** on Tabke and the other four Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters this election season by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=5)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on Brad Tabke and these other Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Let’s have them feel the political pain, instead of our beloved businesses.
When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke get kicked to the curb in an election, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. We need to send a very loud message this election season that there will be a heavy price to pay for trampling on our liberties and shuttering our businesses!
[**Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_we_go_again&n=9), software for leaders.

Two weeks ago, we unveiled a new effort in the fight against disinformation. We’ve long seen COVID-19 as a glaring weak spot in Trump’s narrative — an issue that would allow moderates and persuadable Conservatives to voice their desire for safety over defense of the president.

We believed that when confronted with the grim reality of the pandemic, they would align with reason. We believed it so firmly that we rolled out a new brand entirely, and devoted the bulk of our resources to growing it as quickly as possible.

Well, the results are in, and we’d like to show you the receipts.
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkSg24KetgSPmm9sLo_OIqspCVVbRJnvfWm9itEbtvGmRDW5_WpSiCopsz1h-RwDg9PvDdJ-rLq8vgmjJ7FSnqi8Y-4UBaqMAVFedpXVb-1jVEdrxRTf3EiqCgRbyHnHqsoJNOJKqZQFqTduIuxPSugdi8lmBBlMbxKjaFvPdIYrv4-7tjJRnrEec1MSOohsPuhGKrPHnpbDJ2Ju8qcEdLJwm0VkU70oNMnV_hCT7nMSdR4dIY_wcGHMBXsUgMrB89JtwjVGFmQiBWXsKnCMfK_OHFFdx0E5ojnrhBHf10rKZ/34u/IAKCQVuCTdWPLmSanJJ8BA/h1/lBtdsLA_I-AByhX4inkPl51G9dvxfiWS8YtWXOmjlLQ) Through “Covid Safe Communities,” we are moving the needle among moderate and Conservative voters, and we're sticking to a simple mantra while we do it.

**Speak more persuasively than our peers, not more loudly.**

Among Facebook users who are more likely to engage with Conservative content — such as the users you see in the image above — we’re seeing click through rates from 6% to upwards of 19% on our content. To put this in perspective, the Facebook average for paid media is 0.90%.
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xIsbYIYAaDaVM0NszyqqPOpuVE5NHWilB7LmOdivvZkfIVGiXfL6l0q-6FsGhDsiqemJiRiUctoo4PWTCQRdubBKSUO3MAl-vqOVPa1KnuwPkBIsDpRXkA8eksINRcxVVMKmCb7T1184F5KCWedOaMTFbRgWBzZ4u2LVCEyeUhauCZxc6kTEYqiD1nJIcGxs3tu9SAF3P14scuzVgizfDi2i3qI48j5vq4kbNKcNSfwVyHovyNXhvHQUNCb5U9RWga2GkyIeYE_B90_zqaDa_pncA6EtP_bCi7VgOutE45RInagkze5AmzIuqJULLWS0kZDxbqi7A6paXBBzv47oqM/34u/IAKCQVuCTdWPLmSanJJ8BA/h2/h2QLwUXHfpl8nUHehi9_ZwBJo0cCRXVz_IOvAl3F880) Through every piece of data we obtain, we refine our approach; and through every pivot we make, we spend our dollars more intelligently.

As Trump moves around the country, we will stay one step ahead of him, illustrating the risks that his rallies pose to communities and their people.

**When you make a contribution today, you help us do our part in this election**. We will not reach every persuadable name in the voter file, but for those we reach **through your support** , our conversion rate will be remarkably high

******[ $10 alone can push our content to 1,500 Pennsylvanians. Team,

As Auditor General, Eugene has been a dedicated, independent leader for Pennsylvanians -- fighting to hold powerful people from both parties accountable and put the people of our communities first.

Scott Perry, on the other hand, has consistently advocated for a partisan agenda that hurts PA families. He has fought to strip health care from millions of Americans, voted against lowering prescription drug costs, and supports the White House’s attempt to dismantle critical programs like Social Security and Medicare.

**Look, Scott Perry knows he can’t win this race based on the merits of his record, so he’s trying to lie to voters with his newest ad and distract from his failed leadership.

[We need to push back immediately, team. name: Yo-Yo Ma
subject: Personally asking if you will contribute to the Biden-Harris campaign today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We believe that we are better together than alone. I am worried that we've lost sight of that belief in America. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Dear Peter,

I've lived my life at the borders. Between cultures. Between disciplines. Between musics. Between generations.

And throughout my life I've learned that in culture, we build bridges, not walls. We believe that we are better together than alone. I am worried that we've lost sight of that belief in America.

Peter, we need a president who builds bridges, not walls. That's why I'm personally asking if you can join me in donating to the Biden-Harris campaign today.

**Joe says it best: we are in a battle for the soul of the nation. It 's a battle to uphold and honor the values that we hold dear, values like empathy, and dignity, and respect for truth. These are our values, and they are Joe's values. And they are the values we need for a better future.**

[This election is too important to sit out. If you can, Peter, will you chip in your first $25 to make sure we elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in November?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Joe and Kamala will build bridges, at home and across the globe, to heal our country and to help us move forward, stronger.

They will value diversity and honor America's history as a nation of immigrants, like me. They will respect science and work to combat climate change. They will lead our country through the pandemic and help us build back better.

[We all have a part to play in making that happen, Peter. So, if you can, will you chip in to the Biden-Harris campaign today? Anything you give will make a real difference:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

[https://go.JoeBiden.com/Donate](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B1_yoyoma_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Yo-Yo Ma

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: How Nikema Williams is carrying on John Lewis’ Legacy this November
body:
Help us send this Mom to Congress | | | |
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=2f12358696&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
|
---
| | |
### Friend,

If anyone understands the current state of Georgia politics, it’s state Senator Nikema Williams. After years of working for Planned Parenthood, she won a seat in the state Senate during a special election and in 2019 became the first Black woman to chair the state's Democratic Party. This July, just after civil rights icon and longtime congressman John Lewis passed away, Williams set her sights on Lewis' seat and was voted to replace him on the ballot this November, effectively continuing his legacy of good trouble.

It’s grassroots groups like Moms in Office that will fight tirelessly to ensure Nikema’s success and Lewis’ progress in the state of Georgia. **Can you help us get Nikema to the finish line[ chipping in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=c05ffd7035&e=3f151f8b74) what you can today?**

Those of you who joined our Essential Giving Circle made a huge impact. We were able to raise thousands of dollars that went directly to women running for office during COVID-19. Our candidates are juggling a family while also running for office full time and with stay at home orders in place, it has been very difficult to get their message out and meet voters in person.

Please join our [giving circle](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=970eebc808&e=3f151f8b74) if you are able to and we will send you this amazing mask! **Join us before our limited edition swag runs out.**

Thank you!

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office
---
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=11c8426477&e=3f151f8b74 "CHIP IN")
---
|
---
Congressman John Lewis was America’s greatest champion in the fight for justice and equality, and showed us all how to put the people first. His legacy of Good Trouble will ring on in generations to follow, a guiding light for those continuing to march toward a more righteous future.

-Nikema Williams

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b4/950121440/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark Warner is focused on.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now: **
* Last week, Mark **[met with residents of Harrisonburg](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b3/950121440/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wmra.org/post/sen-warners-roundtable-discussion-harrisonburg#stream/0")** for a community check-up where Mark discussed how he is working to ease inequities across industries, including public health, education, and front line workers. Mark will continue to work to ensure _all_ Virginians get the relief they need.

* Mark **[visited with community leaders in Abingdon](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b2/950121440/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://heraldcourier.com/news/u-s-sen-mark-warner-calls-for-more-business-family-aid/article_6566db74-b256-5e01-a033-f3cab3aa4851.html")** to speak on the federal response to the coronavirus, expansion of broadband services for schools that are going virtual in the fall, and a greater need for telehealth services amid the pandemic.

* Of course, he made time to **[stop by Skeeter's for their world-famous hot dogs!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b1/950121440/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wfxrtv.com/news/local-news/sen-mark-warner-makes-stop-in-wytheville-enjoys-a-skeeterdog/")**

* Mark **[visited Roanoke](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b0/950121440/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wdbj7.com/2020/08/25/warner-visits-western-virginia/")** and the Blue Ridge Parkway to meet with tourism officials to discuss the _Great Americans Outdoors Act_. The bill will fund $1.1 billion in maintenance needs at Virginia National Parks and support as many as 10,000 jobs in Virginia.

* In a visit to downtown Lynchburg, [**Mark listened to the concerns of local leaders and organizers**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803bf/950121440/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://roanoke.com/news/state-and-regional/govt-and-politics/senator-warner-holds-community-check-up-with-lynchburg-leaders/article_c21053cb-f3b2-5ad0-8f89-573a85b25a84.html") regarding broadband, _CARES Act_ funding, and unemployment benefits. Mark knows the importance of broadband in rural Virginia, and he will work with his colleagues in Washington to provide funding to support this essential service in the next _CARES Act_ bill.

* Mark spoke with community leaders about [**the future of a post-COVID economy**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803be/950121440/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.winchesterstar.com/coronavirus/warner-post-covid-economy-is-going-to-look-different/article_056eec4b-e995-5dd0-9c46-06a4cdf2f4a5.html") in Winchester as he toured the Emil & Grace Shihadeh Innovation Center. With 10% to 20% of jobs lost as a result of the pandemic, Mark is working on how he can assist the new workforce generation in a digital world.

* Mark discussed [**issues related to the coronavirus pandemic**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803bd/950121440/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.nvdaily.com/nvdaily/senator-meets-with-shenandoah-county-business-leaders/article_cbab5fb9-029a-52a3-b308-53fbf8b6ec6f.html") and small businesses in Woodstock, Virginia. During the discussion, he talked with community leaders about the next round of _CARES Act_ funding and how the pandemic has affected small businesses.

* [**Mark endorsed Dr. Cameron Webb**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803bc/950121440/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cbs19news.com/story/42537054/warner-endorses-webb-in-5th-congressional-district-bid"), who is running for U.S. Congress in Virginia's 5th District. With his years of service to central Virginia, and his expertise as a doctor and a lawyer, Dr. Webb's voice is one that is sorely needed in the halls of Congress.

* [**In a letter to prominent tech companies**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803bb/950121440/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/sen-mark-warner-urges-tech-companies-to-help-bridge-the-homework-gap/"), Mark urged them to bridge the homework gap and help _all_ Virginia students participate in distance learning this fall. As more educators and students prepare to go back to school virtually, Mark will continue to work to ensure virtual learning is equitable for all students in Virginia and across the country.

* Mark continued to press Postmaster General Louis DeJoy to answer for his attempts to weaken the U.S. Postal Service. Mark is doing [**everything in his power**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803ba/950121440/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.smithfieldtimes.com/2020/08/25/proposals-to-expand-voting-access/") to ensure that all Virginians can count on USPS to deliver their medicine, pay their bills, and cast their ballots come November.

* [**Mark called on President Donald Trump to denounce his support of QAnon**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b9/950121440/VEsHBw/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://news.yahoo.com/warner-senate-report-shows-unprecedented-135351151.html"). With the release of the latest intelligence report detailing the Trump campaign's contact with Russian operatives during the 2016 presidential campaign, Mark will continue to work on the Senate Intelligence committee to keep foreign interference out of our elections.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803b8/950121440/VEsHBg/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db16/53d9897e/55cc2686/1c8803a7/950121440/VEsHAQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: Even for Sen. Cornyn this has been pathetic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
COVID-19 has been a fact of life for half a year, and where has Sen. Cornyn been?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fa2/7f51f7bc/420c8bbf/4efad66d/1968042744/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Since March, COVID-19 has shaped our everyday lives -- from our ability to enjoy moments big and small with family and friends to missing out on milestones like weddings and back-to-school. Six months later, and we would love to tell you that Sen. Cornyn rose to the occasion, but that just isn't true.

**[Now is our chance to hold him accountable by kicking him out of office and electing MJ instead. Pitch in to help.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fa2/7f51f7bc/420c8bbf/4efad66c/1968042744/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200902.1nd__2020__&amount=10")**

**FIRST: Sen. Cornyn downplayed the pandemic** \-- drinking a beer and telling us not to worry while on a long weekend instead of acting quickly to make sure Texans could get tested.

**THEN:** Amid a worsening pandemic and mass job loss, **he called expanded unemployment insurance a "mistake."**

**AND: He spread misinformation about the virus,** saying we don't know whether children can be infected despite all the evidence pointing to the fact that they can.

**NOW:** He's on TV, covering up his failed leadership with ads about reopening schools amidst COVID-19, and **[we need your help to fight back!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fa2/7f51f7bc/420c8bbf/4efad66c/1968042744/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200902.1nd__2020__&amount=10")**

MJ has taken this pandemic seriously from day one, and as the next senator from Texas, she'll continue to treat urgent crises with the seriousness they deserve, not compound them with disastrous leadership.

**Will you pitch in to help us make sure MJ defeats Sen. Cornyn this November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Josh Hicks
subject: You are the driving force of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
In just 35 days, voters across KY-06 will start casting their ballots, meaning we’ve got only a short time left to ensure folks across the community know about our campaign.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18975194/245449380/-1191128446?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200902ThankYou_JH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjBjYzYzZC00OWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=na7Z0EcTiVc-3VsbIGy5zM0F9PqwedeObap3XZvNyUc=)
| | Friends, In just 35 days, voters across KY-06 will start casting their ballots, meaning we’ve got only a short time left to ensure folks across the community know about our campaign. When we win in November, it will be because of small dollar donors, grassroots supporters, and regular folks, who know we need representatives that understand the struggles of everyday working people — not more politicians in the pockets of dark-money corporate donors. **Your support is helping us head into the final stretch of this election stronger than ever before:**
* Our average online donation this quarter is $36!
* More than 3,000 people have contributed to our campaign this quarter. Our donors include teachers, nurses, and retired folks.
* Your support helped us get television and digital ads up well before our opponent, helping us tell our story before the negative attacks come.

So, I just wanted to say thank you standing with us. We wouldn’t be here without you. body:
We need to rally all of our grassroots energy before Trump leaves North Carolina tonight.
|

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Scott Perry for Congress in PA-10
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 2, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Scott Perry for Congress in PA-10
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Scott Perry for Congress in PA-10.
Protect Freedom PAC is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Our organization prides itself on supporting candidates who are conservative fighters that will stand up for individual liberty. Scott Perry has spent his life serving our community, whether that was in the military, the private sector, or in state and federal government. He has a track record of standing up for our values, which is why we are proud to support him in this race."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606

body:
Dear Friend,

Fun Fact: Kelly Loeffler has spent nearly as much on her campaign to beat Doug ($25 million!) as the GDP of a small country.

You read that right - Kelly has spent nearly the equivalent of the GDP of the island nation of Tuvalu in her attempt to trick Georgians into voting for her in November.

We all know Doug is the right choice to represent Georgians in the U.S. Senate. But we're up against an opponent who will literally spend anything--and say anything--in order to defeat Doug. We can't let that happen!
Team Collins needs your help today (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) .

CLICK HERE TO HELP US CONTACT VOTERS AND LET THEM KNOW TO VOTE FOR DOUG COLLINS. (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins)

Sincerely,

Will Smith

Political Director
Collins for Senate, Inc.

**
ICYMI: Women for Doug Collins Kick-off
------------------------------------------------------------

**
------------------------------------------------------------
Last Friday we kicked off the Women for Doug Collins Coalition! Honored to have the support of strong conservative women like Congressional candidate Karen Handel, leaders of Women for America First, and Gen. Michael Flynn's attorney Sidney Powell.

Click here to add your name to the Women for Doug Collins Coalition! (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/endorse)

** Stop by our Field Office in Gainesville!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Our Gainesville field office is open! We're offering remote phone-banking as well as curb-side pickup of yard signs, bumper stickers, and all your favorite Collins for Senate items!
------------------------------------------------------------
Address: 505 Green St., Gainesville, GA 30501

To schedule a pickup, or learn about how you can help the campaign by phone-banking remotely, please email: copelan@dougforgeorgia.com.

**
Team Collins on the Campaign Trail
------------------------------------------------------------
Last week was NUTS! Thank you to the American Peanut Growers Group in Donalsonville for the sheller tour!
Great to start a busy day on the campaign trail last week with folks at the Thomasville GOP!
Whether it's joining Doug at an upcoming event, contacting voters, or putting up a yard sign, we need your help! Visit our website (https://www.dougforgeorgia.com/join_team_collins) or email us at grassroots@dougforgeorgia.com.

============================================================
DOUG IN THE NEWS
** ICYMI: Kelly Loeffler Caught in Another Bold-faced Lie (https://www.espn.com/wnba/story/_/id/29732604/inside-wnba-kelly-loeffler-stalemate-give-somebody-go)

Kelly Loeffler has been caught in another bold-face lie. Despite claiming otherwise, Kelly did in fact allow her basketball team to support Planned Parenthood.

** For the full story click here. (https://www.espn.com/wnba/story/_/id/29732604/inside-wnba-kelly-loeffler-stalemate-give-somebody-go)
** (https://www.espn.com/wnba/story/_/id/29732604/inside-wnba-kelly-loeffler-stalemate-give-somebody-go)
** Fox News: Doug Collins Calls Out Airline for Forcing Air Marshall to Remove American Flag Face Mask (https://www.foxnews.com/us/frontier-airlines-air-marshal-american-flag-face-mask)
"This infringement of a law enforcement officer's right to free speech was clearly a decision made by one of your gate agents based on their own politics."

** For the full story click here. (https://www.foxnews.com/us/frontier-airlines-air-marshal-american-flag-face-mask)
** ICYMI: On Campaign Trail, Collins Fires Back at Attack Ads (https://www.timesenterprise.com/news/state_news/on-campaign-trail-collins-fires-back-at-attack-ads/article_74763058-3e04-5df7-801c-c9aff57643f9.html)
"As our health care workers continue fighting on the frontlines of this pandemic, it is imperative that they have access to the resources needed to stay healthy," Collins said.

** For the full story click here. (https://www.timesenterprise.com/news/state_news/on-campaign-trail-collins-fires-back-at-attack-ads/article_74763058-3e04-5df7-801c-c9aff57643f9.html)

** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/collinsleads/)

** YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCSdKpKukfg7KvkahRzxfSJA/featured)

Our mailing address is:
Collins for Senate, Inc.

Gainesville, GA 30503-1295
USA

name: Team Sri
subject: high stakes for our families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Our district is facing a clear choice in this election. And thanks to the hard work of our supporters over the course of this incredible campaign, we’ve changed what’s possible in our district.

News networks like CNN and independent elections analysis groups like Inside Elections and the Cook Political Report are declaring this race a toss-up -- and we need your help to keep up that momentum. Chip in $5 or whatever you can now:

CONTRIBUTE $5 » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_ts_b1_all&amount=5
CONTRIBUTE MORE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_ts_b1_all&amount=25

We’re up against a candidate whose record proves he’s not in this fight for the families of our community -- and we must fight back.

Troy Nehls is a former police officer with a long record of misconduct, from being discharged for mishandling evidence to lying about being charged with a crime in a sworn statement. He’s attacked survivors of sex trafficking and downplayed and denied the existence of coronavirus even as his own employeers got sick -- and he’s proven eager to become a mouthpiece of Washington special interests and gut health care for millions of families across this state.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and diplomat who knows firsthand what it’s like to nearly go broke from our broken health care system. He’s in this fight to stand for working families in our district and expand access to affordable care, not gut it.

That’s the clear choice we’ll be facing in this election.

Make your choice today: Stand with Sri and with working families all across our district and send us a contribution below.

CONTRIBUTE $5 » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_ts_b1_all&amount=5
CONTRIBUTE MORE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_ts_b1_all&amount=25

Thanks,
Team Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_ts_b1_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f4e252bf-40ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74/6658f5c7-51ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjU4ZjVjNy01MWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gk4damXeSjOK-h67_Z_U6LIH-zApFLa91Nz9-uxoPNM=&id=117373579 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Betsy DeVos' Back-To-School Letter to America's Parents
body:
President Donald Trump and I are fighting every day for more options for every student and every family this fall. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e5b1001ec&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Betsy DeVos' Back-To-School Letter to America's Parents**

“At the end of the day, we want everyone to have the choices to make the best decision for them. Some may choose to learn at home. Some may choose to return to their school. Some may choose to do a combination of both. Each of you needs to be able to choose what’s best for your own families,” Education Secretary Betsy DeVos writes in _The Detroit News_.

“President Donald Trump and I are fighting every day for more options for every student and every family this fall.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77d12edb7e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump will visit Wilmington [North Carolina] on Wednesday to commemorate the 75th Anniversary of the end of World War II, and declare Wilmington as the First World War II Heritage City.” In 2019, President Trump signed legislation to designate at least one city each year as a World War II Heritage City, [WWAY News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45e9611619&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| “The Los Angeles County sheriff’s new policy banning his department from turning over any illegal immigrant criminals to ICE, no matter how serious the crimes, will result in innocent people—often migrants themselves—being killed or raped,” according to a senior DHS official. Read more from Stephen Dinan in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18eb35b9bb&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2020/aug/30/dhs-says-los-angeles-sheriffs-sanctuary-policy-wil/").
---
|
---
| “Each generation deals with its own manifestations of age-old mob frenzies, bullying and public shaming. Salem, Mass., had its witch trials in the 1690s. The 1950s endured its McCarthyism. And we now are enduring our ‘cancel culture.’ But 21st-century public shaming reaches not thousands but tens of millions,” Victor Davis Hanson writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=333eb437bc&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

clean_body: President Donald Trump and I are fighting every day for more options for every student and every family this fall. | | | | | | | Betsy DeVos' Back-To-School Letter to America's Parents “At the end of the day, we want everyone to have the choices to make the best decision for them. Some may choose to learn at home. Some may choose to return to their school. Some may choose to do a combination of both. Each of you needs to be able to choose what’s best for your own families,” Education Secretary Betsy DeVos writes in The Detroit News. “President Donald Trump and I are fighting every day for more options for every student and every family this fall.” | | “President Trump will visit Wilmington [North Carolina] on Wednesday to commemorate the 75th Anniversary of the end of World War II, and declare Wilmington as the First World War II Heritage City.” In 2019, President Trump signed legislation to designate at least one city each year as a World War II Heritage City, reports. | | “The Los Angeles County sheriff’s new policy banning his department from turning over any illegal immigrant criminals to ICE, no matter how serious the crimes, will result in innocent people—often migrants themselves—being killed or raped,” according to a senior DHS official. Read more from Stephen Dinan in "". | | “Each generation deals with its own manifestations of age-old mob frenzies, bullying and public shaming. Salem, Mass., had its witch trials in the 1690s. The 1950s endured its McCarthyism. name: Levar Stoney
subject: Ralph has my back. Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrXP-ilDSu9a2Jzx_WNyGNQlNHSY7k2tTOKT78uAlFw=/bFuH14_vBqtm3qdHoR2BHs9irCHDCevPe2lcgbgj7ys=) _Here at The Way Ahead PAC, we recognize that our world is going through a very uncertain and difficult time right now --a time when it's hard to think of anything but the well-being of our own family and friends. Please only make a donation if you can afford to do so._
---
Hi Friend-- I wanted to make sure you saw the news yesterday -- Governor Northam is supporting my campaign for re-election as Mayor of Richmond! I am honored to have his support and excited to close out the last 62 days of the election with his help. Since I was elected Mayor of Richmond in 2016, we have made incredible investments in programs to help our most vulnerable populations. Through new spending on education and housing, we have been able to give many Richmond families a better chance at success. [We have accomplished a lot in four years, but there is still more work to do. I need your help to get the job done. Governor Northam has my back, can you step up and help my campaign today so that we can build on the progress we've made?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrXP-ilDSu9a2Jzx_WNyGNQlNHSY7k2tTOKT78uAlFw=/ao-1-Skp5r0m7757NbVolRr19C8dIEpiKLq1dXJAZT4=) Ensuring that every child in Richmond has access to a high-quality education has been my number one priority. That's why we built three new schools in Black and Brown neighborhoods, expanded after-school programs to every elementary and middle school, and invested more new monies into our schools than any administration in decades -- all in the last four years! While I am so proud of our work to help children, I am also proud of the steps we have taken to help Richmonders stay in their homes or buy their first home. We created the first-of-its-kind Eviction Diversion Program, which has already helped over 145 families avoid eviction. We also more than tripled our Affordable Housing Trust Fund and built over 1500 affordable housing units in the city. As we face the economic fallout from COVID-19, I plan to do everything in my power to prevent evictions and help Richmonders keep a roof over their heads. No matter what challenge we face, we face it together. Governor Northam has had my back through thick and thin. And I know it's because of his unwavering support that we have been able to save so many lives and protect the economy during this pandemic. But the fight's not over. [We're working to make Richmond the best place it can be: a city that works for everyone. I need to know if I can count on your support today. Please pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us move forward, together.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rrXP-ilDSu9a2Jzx_WNyGNQlNHSY7k2tTOKT78uAlFw=/ao-1-Skp5r0m7757NbVolRr19C8dIEpiKLq1dXJAZT4=) Onward to victory, Levar Stoney Mayor of Richmond

| **_DAILY CALLER_ : Rep. Rhetta Bowers (D) says of Opponent Will Douglas (R): ‘That Boy Needs A Whippin’**
**Dallas, TX** – State Representative Rhetta Bowers (D) said her opponent Will Douglas (R), “needs a whippin,” footage obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation shows. Read part of the article below and see the full article (along with the video) by [CLICKING HERE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f66376f18b&e=4f010155df).
**DAILY CALLER: Texas Democrat Incumbent Says Her Young Conservative Opponent ‘Needs A Whippin’**
_by MARY MARGARET OLOHAN | September 2, 2020_

A Democratic Texas state representative said her young conservative opponent “needs a whippin,” footage obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation shows.

Incumbent Democratic Texas state Rep. Rhetta Bowers participated in a virtual fundraiser Thursday with former 2020 presidential candidate Beto O’Rourke and prospective donors where she discussed her opponent Will Douglas. O’Rourke, who was reportedly present on the call, did not respond to a request for comment from the DCNF.

[...]

“He’s said some things, and he continues to say some things, and he’s young enough, I don’t know if he’s young enough for me to be his mama but I felt like he needed a whoopin the other night, when he said some things,” she continued. “And I awakened the next day feeling like, that boy needs a whippin. And so I’m ready to do that. And I know I can’t do that without you all.”

Bowers did not respond to multiple requests for comment from the DCNF. The state representative has served Texas’s House District 113 since 2018 and is the first African American to represent her district, according to her campaign website.

“In the year 2020, I thought we were past calling your opponent ‘Boy’ or suggesting I needed a ‘whipping,'” Douglas said in a statement to the DCNF.

“I’m not sure if Rhetta was trying to show off for Beto O’Rourke or is just nervous that she’s getting outworked, but I’ll let her comments speak for themselves,” he added.

Douglas describes himself as a “self-made pharmacy owner” and “conservative small businessman.” The 33-year-old is “running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe,” according to his campaign website.
###

clean_body: "A Democratic Texas state rep said her young conservative opponent 'needs a whippin,' footage obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation shows." | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE September 2, 2020 CONTACT:mailto:txnorris@gmail.com?subject=Will%20Douglas%20\(TX-HD-113\) (972) 948-6054 | DAILY CALLER : Rep. Rhetta Bowers (D) says of Opponent Will Douglas (R): ‘That Boy Needs A Whippin’ Dallas, TX – State Representative Rhetta Bowers (D) said her opponent Will Douglas (R), “needs a whippin,” footage obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation shows. Read part of the article below and see the full article (along with the video) by . DAILY CALLER: Texas Democrat Incumbent Says Her Young Conservative Opponent ‘Needs A Whippin’ by MARY MARGARET OLOHAN | September 2, 2020 A Democratic Texas state representative said her young conservative opponent “needs a whippin,” footage obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation shows. Incumbent Democratic Texas state Rep. Rhetta Bowers participated in a virtual fundraiser Thursday with former 2020 presidential candidate Beto O’Rourke and prospective donors where she discussed her opponent Will Douglas. O’Rourke, who was reportedly present on the call, did not respond to a request for comment from the DCNF. [...] “He’s said some things, and he continues to say some things, and he’s young enough, I don’t know if he’s young enough for me to be his mama but I felt like he needed a whoopin the other night, when he said some things,” she continued. “And I awakened the next day feeling like, that boy needs a whippin. And so I’m ready to do that. And I know I can’t do that without you all.” Bowers did not respond to multiple requests for comment from the DCNF. The state representative has served Texas’s House District 113 since 2018 and is the first African American to represent her district, according to her campaign website. “In the year 2020, I thought we were past calling your opponent ‘Boy’ or suggesting I needed a ‘whipping,'” Douglas said in a statement to the DCNF. “I’m not sure if Rhetta was trying to show off for Beto O’Rourke or is just nervous that she’s getting outworked, but I’ll let her comments speak for themselves,” he added. Douglas describes himself as a “self-made pharmacy owner” and “conservative small businessman.” The 33-year-old is “running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe,” according to his campaign website. | | | | | | | | | | | | "CONTRIBUTE" | | Copyright © 2020 Will Douglas for Texas, All rights reserved.

**Friend -- Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff's opponent AND Trump's #1 right-hand man, Senator David Perdue, has worked for years to put Social Security funding on the chopping block.**

GOOD NEWS: In the Senate, Jon Ossoff will DEFEND Social Security -- not cut it.

Right now, Jon is neck and neck in the polls against Perdue. We need your help to keep up the momentum and put Jon in a great position to beat Perdue!

This week, as we mark the 85th anniversary of the Social Security Act, President Trump issued an Executive Order _putting Social Security funding in JEOPARDY_!

**If Senator David Perdue had his way, he'd gut Social Security and other essential benefits.**

_Perdue has worked for years to _put Social Security funding on the chopping block_ , he supported a plan to _slash Medicare funding by nearly $500 billion_ , and he wants to _raise the retirement age_._

**Perdue wants to put benefits for Georgia seniors at risk.**

**[Democrat Jon Ossoff will defend Social Security and Medicare, and right now he's NECK and NECK in the polls with Perdue. Will you chip in $10 right now to make sure Jon beats Perdue?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2baa/5b2c1286/38487fdd/25f0d93b/1254427330/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_soc_sec?refcode=em_2020_09_02_soc_sec_k&amount=10")**

Friend, we've squandered trillions of dollars on needless wars, bank bailouts, and tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans -- then we're told there's no money for health care, Social Security, and other critical benefits.

Perdue has said in the past, in regard to Social Security, "we cannot afford the commitments that we've been making." _But three years ago, he was happy to support the GOP's massive tax cut for corporations that could mean future Social Security cuts._

**The only reason Social Security is in any danger is because it is being relentlessly attacked by Republicans like Perdue.**

**_When they say we can't afford to fund Social Security, THEY ARE LYING._**

And it's not just working-class seniors whom Perdue doesn't care about; in the middle of an economic crisis, _he led the charge to cut unemployment benefits and opposes stimulus checks_.

**David Perdue doesn't care about benefits that protect the livelihood of millions of his constituents. He only cares about the financial interests of the corporations that bankroll his campaign.**

We need to elect new leaders like Jon Ossoff who will protect these benefits -- and vote out self-serving politicians like Perdue.

**[Today, on the anniversary of President Franklin D. Roosevelt signing the Social Security Act into law, will you defend Social Security by supporting Jon Ossoff's campaign to send David Perdue into retirement?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2baa/5b2c1286/38487fdd/25f0d93a/1254427330/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_soc_sec?refcode=em_2020_09_02_soc_sec_k")**

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: A historic grassroots moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I wanted to make sure you were the first to know that last month we accomplished an incredible, historic feat. |
---

Peter, these are difficult times for our country, but in times like this, the American people lean on one another. We're stronger because of it. We accomplish extraordinary things when we come together, it's always been that way.

I have long said that I believe that this is the only way forward -- as a united America. United in our determination to make the coming years bright. After the dark vision of the future that was on display at the Republican convention last week, I think we see more than ever what is at stake in the election, and what is worth fighting for. Our shared values and vision of what this country could be when we choose light over dark and unity over division. And every supporter, every donor on this campaign, has invested in that vision, and our campaign has grown exponentially in the past month because there are far, far more of us than Donald Trump would like you to think.

And it's in that spirit that I wanted to make sure you were the first to know that last month we accomplished an incredible, historic feat, and it was all possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you chipping in a little bit at a time.

**In August, together, we raised $364.5 million.** That figure blows me away.

And we raised it the right way, from people across the country stepping up to own a piece of this campaign, investing in the future we want to see for our kids and grandkids.

From the very start of August, the campaign had an energy that set us up for this historic milestone. **And I wanted to share a few more important numbers with you, Peter, because this really means a lot to me:**
* \-- 95% of all donations were from grassroots supporters, folks like yourself chipping in to emails like this.
* \-- More than 1.5 million supporters stepped up and made their first donation in August, and I'm proud to share we're now more than 4 million donors strong.
* \-- Over $205 million, or 57% of the money we raised, came from online donations, from people like you, chipping in $5, $10, $20 at a time. **This makes August the best month for online fundraising in political history.**

More than anything, these numbers humble me. Even in a global recession, working families set aside some money to power this campaign, and a little bit added up in a big way.

Democrats united in a way that pundits deemed impossible in the primary. When Kamala Harris joined me as my running mate, we were able to continue with this momentum and enter the most unconventional convention with a resolve to make our party, and our country, stronger in the process.

And it was the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States on August 20, 2020, and that night I made a promise to all of you, to be your President, no matter who you are.

And you all thanked me in the most humbling way imaginable, donating to our campaign in record volumes, making the hour from 11pm to midnight that night the biggest hour for online fundraising in August.

I've said it before and I'll say it again, this campaign is for anyone who has been knocked down and counted out, and stood up stronger. This is your campaign, and you will always have a home here.

And these past few months have tested us, Americans have been hit hard by this pandemic, by this economic crisis, by the systemic racism that haunts our country, and Americans have been let down by their president.

But as Americans you stood up, you rose up to meet this moment and to declare that we are better than Donald Trump and we are better than this.

We did not give into the darkness, or into despair. We did not give up. Because that's not who we are.

We choose hope over fear. And we will not back down from the challenges facing us. And thanks to all of you, to your commitment and your excitement, we met this moment, and we will continue to do so in the next 62 days, as long as we stick together.

So I'm writing today to thank you, and to congratulate you. You did this, every single one of you. This historic achievement belongs to you, as does this campaign.

But we're not done yet, there is still much work to do in the 9 weeks ahead. Trump's money machine remains and it's bolstered by outside, dark money -- not grassroots donors like all of you. And you better believe they will pour it all into attacks and smears against me, against Kamala, and against our campaign. Just this week a new Trump Super PAC launched $30 million in new ads full of lies.

So we have to keep pushing the limits of what we thought was possible. We have to keep breaking records if we want to ensure a fighting chance at winning this thing.

[So I have to ask, because there is not a moment to spare, can you help me keep this going? Can we bring this same momentum into the final two months? Because we will need every drop of it, and every dollar, to beat Donald Trump.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B2_numbers_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.02_B2_numbers_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

clean_body: I wanted to make sure you were the first to know that last month we accomplished an incredible, historic feat. | Peter, these are difficult times for our country, but in times like this, the American people lean on one another. We're stronger because of it. We accomplish extraordinary things when we come together, it's always been that way. I have long said that I believe that this is the only way forward -- as a united America. United in our determination to make the coming years bright. After the dark vision of the future that was on display at the Republican convention last week, I think we see more than ever what is at stake in the election, and what is worth fighting for. Our shared values and vision of what this country could be when we choose light over dark and unity over division. And every supporter, every donor on this campaign, has invested in that vision, and our campaign has grown exponentially in the past month because there are far, far more of us than Donald Trump would like you to think. And it's in that spirit that I wanted to make sure you were the first to know that last month we accomplished an incredible, historic feat, and it was all possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you chipping in a little bit at a time. In August, together, we raised $364.5 million. That figure blows me away. And we raised it the right way, from people across the country stepping up to own a piece of this campaign, investing in the future we want to see for our kids and grandkids. From the very start of August, the campaign had an energy that set us up for this historic milestone. And I wanted to share a few more important numbers with you, Peter, because this really means a lot to me: \-- 95% of all donations were from grassroots supporters, folks like yourself chipping in to emails like this. \-- More than 1.5 million supporters stepped up and made their first donation in August, and I'm proud to share we're now more than 4 million donors strong. \-- Over $205 million, or 57% of the money we raised, came from online donations, from people like you, chipping in $5, $10, $20 at a time. This makes August the best month for online fundraising in political history. More than anything, these numbers humble me. Even in a global recession, working families set aside some money to power this campaign, and a little bit added up in a big way. Democrats united in a way that pundits deemed impossible in the primary. When Kamala Harris joined me as my running mate, we were able to continue with this momentum and enter the most unconventional convention with a resolve to make our party, and our country, stronger in the process. And it was the honor of my lifetime to accept your nomination for President of the United States on August 20, 2020, and that night I made a promise to all of you, to be your President, no matter who you are. And you all thanked me in the most humbling way imaginable, donating to our campaign in record volumes, making the hour from 11pm to midnight that night the biggest hour for online fundraising in August. I've said it before and I'll say it again, this campaign is for anyone who has been knocked down and counted out, and stood up stronger. This is your campaign, and you will always have a home here. And these past few months have tested us, Americans have been hit hard by this pandemic, by this economic crisis, by the systemic racism that haunts our country, and Americans have been let down by their president. But as Americans you stood up, you rose up to meet this moment and to declare that we are better than Donald Trump and we are better than this. We did not give into the darkness, or into despair. We did not give up. Because that's not who we are. We choose hope over fear. And we will not back down from the challenges facing us. And thanks to all of you, to your commitment and your excitement, we met this moment, and we will continue to do so in the next 62 days, as long as we stick together. So I'm writing today to thank you, and to congratulate you. You did this, every single one of you. This historic achievement belongs to you, as does this campaign. But we're not done yet, there is still much work to do in the 9 weeks ahead. Trump's money machine remains and it's bolstered by outside, dark money -- not grassroots donors like all of you. And you better believe they will pour it all into attacks and smears against me, against Kamala, and against our campaign. Just this week a new Trump Super PAC launched $30 million in new ads full of lies. So we have to keep pushing the limits of what we thought was possible. We have to keep breaking records if we want to ensure a fighting chance at winning this thing. name: Bill Olson
subject: I support our gun rights, our police, and our rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gPrJeuXGLF6OuRU&b=8iwNuqST815EeF6F7A7c3w

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I am the Republican who will flip this swing district because people here want law and order and are tired of the Biden Riots! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gPrJeuXGLF6OuRU&b=8iwNuqST815EeF6F7A7c3w

The Biden Riots have been horrific all year long. I cannot believe that the liberal Democrat mayors of this country have not restored law and order by attesting the violent, in some cases murderous, Antifa rioters!

What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it.

Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, decided to clean up the graffiti left by the rioters the previous night. He stuck around to offer medical help to the injured rioters (!) and protect the businesses from more destruction and looting.

Just like with Sandmann, the media, especially CNN and the Washington Post, immediately attacked this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him.

In a word, these violent rioters were trying to kill this kid- to cancel him, FOR NO GOOD REASON.

In a statement late Friday, Rittenhouse's attorneys said he was defending himself from a "mob" of attackers who "accosted" and "verbally threatened and taunted" him while he was guarding a mechanic’s shop on Sheridan Road with a group of armed men and he was legally justified in firing the weapon.

Rittenhouse was being chased when he heard a gunshot behind him, the release said. He said he turned and was faced with "an attacker lunging towards him and reaching for his rifle."

According to the criminal complaint, 26-year-old Joseph Rosenbaum, who was unarmed, was fatally shot by Rittenhouse.

The release goes on to describe "a growing mob" that chased Rittenhouse down the street until he fell down. The people chasing him "kicked" him and "bashed him over the head with a skateboard."

The criminal complaint describes that a crowd followed Rittenhouse, with people shouting "get him!" and saying he had just shot someone.
