name: Sandy Smith
subject: The communist mob cannot win!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am tired of the Biden riots and the violence caused by the Democrats' overheated rhetoric attacking anyone they disagree with!**

Did you catch the Republican Convention last week? It was fantastic- a real week-long celebration of being an American.
As this was happening, the Democrats were conducting violent riots in Portland and Kenosha, completely without consequence from local liberal Mayors who have allowed the destruction and murder.
On Thursday, they brought that destruction and rioting and violence to Washington, another city with a crazy liberal mayor. And the rioters took advantage of it by attacking peaceful Republicans coming out of the White House.
_**One of these was Senator Rand Paul, who gave his account of the assault later:**_
_In his speech to the Republican National Convention Thursday night, President Trump said if you want the rest of the country to look like Portland, Ore., put the Democrats fully in charge and that’s what you’ll get._
_That’s hard to argue with considering what we are seeing in many of our cities, where well-intentioned protest marches long ago were hijacked into lawless and violent destructive anarchy, often led by outside agitators and violent Marxists._
_I experienced some of this in Washington after the president’s speech.

My wife Kelley and I were attempting to leave the White House event. We were staying at a hotel directly across the street, maybe 50 yards from the gates of the White House. But as we went to leave, it became apparent there was no safe exit out the gates and through the unruly mob that had gathered there._
_Why? Because another Democratic-run city had decided it would bow to lawless rioters instead of protecting its citizens. Mayor Muriel Bowser was asked by the Secret Service to allow wider and better protection for those leaving the White House Thursday night, but she refused._

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg)
---

_For the record, Senator Paul has now been attacked three times by crazed liberals, one of which required several surgeries and the removal of part of his lung._

**He has suffered much for doing the right thing, including the "Justice for Breanna Taylor" Act. The crowd, ignorant of this, was actually demanding for Rand to say her name- or else they would harm him.**

**_This is Joe Biden's America. These people aren't Republicans. These rioters HATE Republicans- just like Biden, Pelosi, Butterfield and all the Democrats do. _**

You cannot govern a nation you hate, and yet, that's what Biden's Democrats are trying to do.

_THAT is why we must win. THAT is why we need to push hard here!_

**If we do not defeat the Democrats this year, all of us- freedom-loving Americans and conservatives- will be cancelled. Persecuted. **

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg) Unlike Pelosi, unlike Butterfield, I will love America and help Americans!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg). Our country needs us NOW! Let's stand up now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=g0Gg3JvDE3Nxmng&b=igljzPvuTgI016Ur2ECltg) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

body:
Join Senator Cory Booker and Beto during a special virtual phone bank next Tuesday as we work to identify Democratic voters across Texas.
#
You won't want to miss this, Friend —
[**You’re invited to join special guest Sen. Cory Booker and Beto for a special phone bank next Tuesday!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43035?source=ema20200902-103663&t=1&akid=103663%2E444211%2Ef4tcLH)
Sen. Booker is kicking off our phone bank next Tuesday because he knows what you, Beto, and all the other Powered by People volunteers know — Texas can turn blue. And this November, if we work together, we will flip it.
Upcoming events:
---
[Virtual Phone Bank with Beto, featuring special guest Sen. Cory Booker](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43035?source=ema20200902-103663&t=2&akid=103663%2E444211%2Ef4tcLH)[
Tuesday, September 8, 6:30 pm CT](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43036?source=ema20200902-103663&t=3&akid=103663%2E444211%2Ef4tcLH) **[Get more info or RSVP »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43036?source=ema20200902-103663&t=4&akid=103663%2E444211%2Ef4tcLH)**
During this phone bank, we’ll be reaching out to voters across Texas. We’re leaving no neighborhood or community uncalled this year. Because if we’re going to fully flip Texas – from who we send to the State House and the White House – we need folks to vote up and down the ballot.
[**Don’t miss out on this chance to make a difference in our state’s history and hear a special message from Sen. Booker with Beto by your (virtual) side!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43035?source=ema20200902-103663&t=5&akid=103663%2E444211%2Ef4tcLH)
See you on the dialer,
Powered by People

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Our big decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn doesn't understand and he doesn't listen.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fac/7f51f7bc/42038bf3/4efadaa2/3056824017/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Being a senator was never my dream, Peter.

I never wanted to run for office until I realized how broken the political system was -- when I was working to open ground combat roles to women and couldn't get a meeting with the very people in Washington who were supposed to represent me.

**Sen. Cornyn stopped understanding what Texans were going through the minute he stopped listening to us.** | [REPLACE SEN. CORNYN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fac/7f51f7bc/42038bf3/4efadaa1/3056824017/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200902.2nd__2022__&amount=10")
---
I'm a fighter, a veteran, and a working mom. I get what this pandemic is putting families through right now because it's what my family is going through. My husband and I had to make a big decision. My oldest son was so excited for his first day of kindergarten, to meet all his new friends, to start a new adventure -- but Brandon and I had to make sure he's safe. Instead of going into school and seeing all of his friends, he'll be doing his first days of school online.

Sen. Cornyn isn't listening to Texas families worried for their kids' safety. He's carelessly misleading families just like mine, suggesting that we don't know whether kids can get COVID-19. We deserve a leader who understands what Texas families are going through.

I never wanted to run for office until I realized how broken the political system was -- when I was working to open ground combat roles to women and couldn't get a meeting with the very people in Washington who were supposed to represent me. Sen. Cornyn stopped understanding what Texans were going through the minute he stopped listening to us. | "" I'm a fighter, a veteran, and a working mom. I get what this pandemic is putting families through right now because it's what my family is going through. My husband and I had to make a big decision. My oldest son was so excited for his first day of kindergarten, to meet all his new friends, to start a new adventure -- but Brandon and I had to make sure he's safe. Instead of going into school and seeing all of his friends, he'll be doing his first days of school online. Sen. Cornyn isn't listening to Texas families worried for their kids' safety. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: About Scott Perry’s divisive comments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
This is not an email I want to send you, but I wanted you to hear directly from me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979154/245549003/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_b2_ed_all-nd&refcode2=ec7d31b4-6ded-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkMzFiNC02ZGVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKWLNh-9rXjpfJ8Zrfp00BhQ98eyJLgaSgBK9-yFGa8=) Friend,

This is not an email I want to send you, but I wanted you to hear directly from me. Our country has faced so many challenges this year -- a global pandemic, rising economic anxiety, and a long overdue reckoning with systemic racism.

I sympathize with the pain, anger, and grief that communities of color have felt this year. **And that’s why I was so disappointed to see Scott Perry’s divisive comments today:** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979155/245549004/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_b2_ed_all-nd&refcode2=ec7d31b4-6ded-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkMzFiNC02ZGVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKWLNh-9rXjpfJ8Zrfp00BhQ98eyJLgaSgBK9-yFGa8=)
Friend, these comments are just plain wrong, and they speak to how out of touch Scott Perry is with this district. We need a real leader who isn’t afraid to take our most difficult and pressing issues head-on -- not dismiss them as nonexistent or sensationalist.

**Let me be clear when I say that Scott Perry is no longer fit to lead -- he has proven that he lacks the courage to rise to the occasion and unite our community.**

We deserve so much better, friend. That’s why my team and I are working to deliver real change and bring new leadership to South Central PA, but I can’t do it without you. [**If you can, I hope you consider joining this fight by chipping in to our campaign now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979156/245549005/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_b2_ed_all-nd&refcode2=ec7d31b4-6ded-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkMzFiNC02ZGVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKWLNh-9rXjpfJ8Zrfp00BhQ98eyJLgaSgBK9-yFGa8=)

In this together,

Eugene | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979157/245549006/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.02_b2_ed_all-nd&refcode2=ec7d31b4-6ded-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzdkMzFiNC02ZGVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKWLNh-9rXjpfJ8Zrfp00BhQ98eyJLgaSgBK9-yFGa8=)

name: Sri
subject: Exciting Event Tomorrow Evening with 3 other Former Foreign Service Officers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979216/245549693/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.01_b1_s_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg1ZWEwMC02ZWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8w1anFZLOmiJY2u0nQrqHeHCbeUtYsl0sGiGDnF-Mg=)
---
| Hello Friend! I’m thrilled to be inviting you to an exciting event **Tommorrow, Thursday, Sept. 3rd @5:30pm CT** that will include four foreign service officers, including former Ambassadors Pamela White and Linda Thomas-Greenfield. Serve America PAC is hosting a space with these incredible ambassadors where Stephanie Schmid (Democratic nominee in NJ-04 and also a former foreign service officer!) and I will discuss the state of our country’s foreign affairs and how we want to change it once we’re in office. Here’s a little more about who will be on this event- Amb. Pamela White has spent four decades of her life representing her country; she’s served in Burkina Faso, Egypt, Haiti, Liberia, Mali, Senegal, South Africa, and Tanzania, and was the deputy director for East Africa at USAID headquarters in Washington, DC. She has also been the U.S. Ambassador to Gambia and Haiti, and Stephanie Schmid, who served under her, worked with her to oversee crucial relief efforts after the earthquake in 2010. Ambassador Linda Thomas-Greenfield has also served in many prestigious positions, such as U.S. Assistant Secretary of State for African Affairs, Director General of the Foreign Service Human Resources, and was a U.S. Ambassador to Liberia. And tomorrow evening, I will have the pleasure of joining these decorated public servants to discuss the future of American diplomacy - **a** **conversation I want you to be a part of as well**. Please join Serve America, former Ambassadors Pamela White and Linda Thomas-Greenfield, Stephanie Schmid and I tomorrow evening by following the link below or contacting Matt at Matt@Sri2020.com. **[RSVP HERE!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979217/245549694/427412566?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg1ZWEwMC02ZWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8w1anFZLOmiJY2u0nQrqHeHCbeUtYsl0sGiGDnF-Mg=)** Best, Sri
* * *
_Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979218/245549695/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg1ZWEwMC02ZWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8w1anFZLOmiJY2u0nQrqHeHCbeUtYsl0sGiGDnF-Mg=&emci=f57f0f69-57ed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=fb85ea00-6eed-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979219/245549696/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.01_b1_s_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg1ZWEwMC02ZWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8w1anFZLOmiJY2u0nQrqHeHCbeUtYsl0sGiGDnF-Mg=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18979220/245549697/-1290848981?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.01_b1_s_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg1ZWEwMC02ZWVkLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8w1anFZLOmiJY2u0nQrqHeHCbeUtYsl0sGiGDnF-Mg=)

clean_body: = | Hello Friend! I’m thrilled to be inviting you to an exciting event Tommorrow, Thursday, Sept. 3rd @5:30pm CT that will include four foreign service officers, including former Ambassadors Pamela White and Linda Thomas-Greenfield. Serve America PAC is hosting a space with these incredible ambassadors where Stephanie Schmid (Democratic nominee in NJ-04 and also a former foreign service officer!) and I will discuss the state of our country’s foreign affairs and how we want to change it once we’re in office. Here’s a little more about who will be on this event- Amb. Pamela White has spent four decades of her life representing her country; she’s served in Burkina Faso, Egypt, Haiti, Liberia, Mali, Senegal, South Africa, and Tanzania, and was the deputy director for East Africa at USAID headquarters in Washington, DC. She has also been the U.S. Ambassador to Gambia and Haiti, and Stephanie Schmid, who served under her, worked with her to oversee crucial relief efforts after the earthquake in 2010. Ambassador Linda Thomas-Greenfield has also served in many prestigious positions, such as U.S. Assistant Secretary of State for African Affairs, Director General of the Foreign Service Human Resources, and was a U.S. Ambassador to Liberia. And tomorrow evening, I will have the pleasure of joining these decorated public servants to discuss the future of American diplomacy - a conversation I want you to be a part of as well. Please join Serve America, former Ambassadors Pamela White and Linda Thomas-Greenfield, Stephanie Schmid and I tomorrow evening by following the link below or contacting Matt at Matt@Sri2020.com. = Best, Sri Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Mark Warner
subject: 62 days.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

We've got 62 days until Election Day, and we're going to need to make sure we keep up the momentum we saw on Super Tuesday in Virginia. A record number of ballots were cast in the Democratic primary, and we need that kind of history-making turnout on November 3rd if we're going to elect and re-elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

So please, if you haven't already, make sure you're registered to vote. Whether you're planning to vote with a no-excuse absentee ballot, vote early in person, or vote on Election Day, it's so important that you have a plan to cast your ballot. You can check your registration status here: **[iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db1a/53d9897e/55ce2a42/1c880314/2747313886/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://iwillvote.com")**.

As we move forward, I know that nothing is guaranteed. I'm thinking back to 2014, when I won my race by less than 1%. But I'm feeling hopeful, and a lot of that has to do with support from folks like you who are on Team Warner.

I'm ready to keep rolling up my sleeves and putting in the work to make life better for everyone in the Commonwealth. Thank you for supporting me along the way. Let's go out and win on November 3rd. |
---
-- Mark Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db1a/53d9897e/55ce2a42/1c880313/2747313886/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc1NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200902_f_1_nd__754__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

subject: CNN reports IA-02 could flip RED

body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/JB9GbAVjrb-YUN3MOgYbuAdW8JGHmr6t5ASqUyu3oGM=/7ySO-nV1OMP4y_AilljFUvHsnvc51OWKM22UGZWOxq8=?refcode=200902-email-pm) **Iowa 's Second District Among the top 10 Most Likely to Flip According to CNN!** **[We need your help to turn the tides and keep IA-02 BLUE!](https://act.myngp.com/el/JB9GbAVjrb-YUN3MOgYbuAdW8JGHmr6t5ASqUyu3oGM=/H8OsfXk6so1JCM0dQOwtpUluvjFKbHyamG122YRdtcg=?refcode=200902-email-pm)** | ****[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/JB9GbAVjrb-YUN3MOgYbuAdW8JGHmr6t5ASqUyu3oGM=/7ySO-nV1OMP4y_AilljFUvHsnvc51OWKM22UGZWOxq8=?refcode=200902-email-pm)****
---
* * *
Peter,
We've known from the start that Rita's race was going to be one of the most competitive in the country. Now, CNN is watching IA-02 as one of its top 10 seats most likely to flip -- and they think our opponent has a chance to flip this district red!

Friend,

With Mitch McConnell in charge, the U.S. Senate has become a LEGISLATIVE GRAVEYARD, with hundreds of House bills sitting on his desk.

Bills that would extend COVID-19 unemployment benefits, pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act, protect Americans' health care, and so many more.

**McConnell and his Senate Republican lieutenants like David Perdue do not care about passing these bills to help the American people.**

__Instead, they are on a summer break avoiding it all.__

Peter,
_**The Biden-Harris ticket has it out for New Mexico’s oil and gas industry workers.**_ In the primary, Vice-President Biden noted his desire to _**“end all oil drilling”**_ and was vocal about his support for _**a ban on fracking.**_ Senator Harris is no better. She’s cozied up with Progressive Democrats and _**supports AOC’s pie-in-the-sky Green New Deal**_ , which would raise all of our taxes and create insane rules for individuals and industry alike.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, The Biden-Harris ticket has it out for New Mexico’s oil and gas industry workers. In the primary, Vice-President Biden noted his desire to “end all oil drilling” and was vocal about his support for a ban on fracking. Senator Harris is no better. She’s cozied up with Progressive Democrats and supports AOC’s pie-in-the-sky Green New Deal , which would raise all of our taxes and create insane rules for individuals and industry alike. A sure-fire way to destroy New Mexico’s economy is to handicap our leading industries and raise our taxes. | My opponent, Nancy Pelosi’s Assistant Speaker of the House Ben Ray Lujan, shares Biden and Harris’ DC pedigree and radical Green New Deal policies. As a meteorologist, I know we can keep our environment AND our economy healthy. Their radical policies do more to satisfy their radical progressive base than to help the environment. | | | Thank you for your continued support, Mark P.S. Biden, Harris, and my opponent, Ben Ray Lujan, will destroy our state's economy and raise our taxes trying to implement the radical Green New Deal. Help me tell more New Mexicans that there is another way: we can protect the economy and the environment. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

name: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen Action
subject: New report from the Special Committee on the Climate Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
The strongest set of climate commitments ever to come out of the Senate.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2636%2E53494%2EE4uqUm) Friend, Senate Democrats' Special Committee on the Climate Crisis just released a new report on how bold climate action from Congress can create millions of good-paying jobs in a clean-energy-led economy. Combined with the House Climate Crisis Committee report (released in June) and Vice President Biden's Build Back Better climate plan (released in July), this new Senate report (released in August) makes it clear that climate action is on the top of our nation's agenda and that our momentum is only building. (Makes you wonder what we might see in September.) **[Add your name to thank Committee Chair Sen. Brian Schatz and the rest of the Special Committee for their bold commitment to climate action.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/773?t=3&akid=2636%2E53494%2EE4uqUm)** While the GOP denies the urgency of the climate crisis, Democratic leaders are coalescing behind an approach to solving it through robust clean energy standards, major job-creating investments, and environmental justice. This report constitutes the strongest set of climate commitments ever to come out of the Senate. The Special Committee deserves major praise for laying the groundwork in the Senate for our clean energy future. **[Sign on to thank the Special Committee on the Climate Crisis for helping to bring bold climate action to the top of America's agenda.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/773?t=4&akid=2636%2E53494%2EE4uqUm)** We're just getting started. And we can't thank you enough for your support. Maggie Thomas
Political Director, Evergreen Action | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/773?t=5&akid=2636%2E53494%2EE4uqUm)

clean_body: The strongest set of climate commitments ever to come out of the Senate. | Friend, Senate Democrats' Special Committee on the Climate Crisis just released a new report on how bold climate action from Congress can create millions of good-paying jobs in a clean-energy-led economy. Combined with the House Climate Crisis Committee report (released in June) and Vice President Biden's Build Back Better climate plan (released in July), this new Senate report (released in August) makes it clear that climate action is on the top of our nation's agenda and that our momentum is only building. (Makes you wonder what we might see in September.) While the GOP denies the urgency of the climate crisis, Democratic leaders are coalescing behind an approach to solving it through robust clean energy standards, major job-creating investments, and environmental justice. This report constitutes the strongest set of climate commitments ever to come out of the Senate. The Special Committee deserves major praise for laying the groundwork in the Senate for our clean energy future. We're just getting started. And we can't thank you enough for your support. Maggie Thomas Political Director, Evergreen Action |

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It's critical that we make sure we get the most up-to-date response from you on your voting plans for this fall. |
---
Peter,

The opportunity that we've been waiting for since November 9th, 2016, is nearly here: the ability to vote Donald Trump out of office and get our country back on track.

Early voting begins _this month,_ and we're not taking a single vote for granted. In 2016, Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin were all decided by less than 50,000 votes each.

So it's critical that we make sure we get the most up-to-date response from you on your voting plans for this fall.

**And it doesn't look like you've answered one of these polls before, so we're really hoping we can get a response from you and lock in your support.**

[Peter, this is the final time we'll send you this poll before early voting begins, so please make sure to get your response in here »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b180/1cd0ac28/15786baa6/3570f452/629294828/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/september-vote-for-joe-and-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.09.02_B3_septvotepoll_X__F1_S2_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.09.02_B3_septvotepoll_X__F1_S2_C1__full") __| **BIDEN-HARRIS HQ SEPTEMBER TRACKING POLL**

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Contact tracing for schools
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Yesterday, I talked about our comprehensive approach to testing. Today, I want to talk about what happens next: contact tracing. I want to make sure parents, students and teachers understand how this process will work. When we talk about contact tracing, we're actually talking about two things: case investigation and contact tracing.
* Case investigation is when the Department of Health works with someone who has tested positive to help them remember everyone they've been in close contact with while they may have been infectious.
* Contact tracing begins when we start reaching out to those individuals and getting them safely into quarantine.

Preventing spread in schools, while limiting any disruption in learning, will require an aggressive contact tracing program. That's why we're establishing a dedicated, 50-person K-12 contact tracing team for students and staff at both public and private schools.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DO9OZQVPTdFmYwuAB3osa4y762m6lcfKWWvG1lHC0JmuC1-DAMpVAkoz91Lnhbkj6t5RDI200C7j2Bwh59JIgeZ-fKCHTulnpizcNFfZ6kSsqsMerv910yyIzPPPtNbx6kbsC17TbYxQt62Vyey9e7GIkx-YGqL25YdgP-8gNF9YD9pl-1LQYTRqGv05ltMDcAQAiTcFA2o=&c=cpexEYwrMAO-zS4hN_ZAVX0PPtV_7TIEAX3Ib8EJhR8wp8jwwb5xUQ==&ch=aVSClDxEsk6ZWgo7wf4MvcCxVomiNNNVmKMt4nMvdVMYVdPgZr6-Lw==)
---
| If you're a student or work in a school and you test positive for COVID, you're going to get a call from a Department of Health K-12 case investigator. They'll ask you a series of questions about where you've been and who you've been with in the last two weeks. In addition to that phone call, our case investigators will connect directly with the school to determine your close contacts. Every school has a designated staff member to assist with case investigations. Close contacts will need to quarantine for 14 days, and during that time they'll do distance learning. They'll be monitored for symptoms and get tested, but even if they don't develop symptoms and even if they have a negative test result, they will still need to quarantine for a full two weeks. One question I've been hearing from parents is, "If my child's classmate tests positive, does my child need to quarantine?" And from teachers, "If a student tests positive, do I need to quarantine?" The answer is no, unless you meet the definition of a close contact--if you were closer than 6 feet for more than 15 minutes at a time. That won't be everyone in your stable pod, just those right around you. Classmates and teachers will only need to quarantine if they were a close contact. Every school has set up processes for communicating with students and families when there is a positive case in a school. Our focus is quickly identifying those cases through testing and containing them through quarantine, case investigation, and contact tracing. We've done it all summer in childcare, congregate care settings, churches and more. We know how to do this, and we've set up a robust system focused on K-12 to get it done.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DO9OZQVPTdFmYwuAB3osa4y762m6lcfKWWvG1lHC0JmuC1-DAMpVApADNziQ_yTbCSOQok7QachBOJfC0pLHA1YqRs17H6aBMuzExMRRaXxrgdVqKluQjHFTR11FJjTPc9T5UMITbHl0fdXGx38tSLBDaWAeubuTDZtXIhiuRwBam044i8mnRUAiwhlTyiqrJ6ONsyrEYsE=&c=cpexEYwrMAO-zS4hN_ZAVX0PPtV_7TIEAX3Ib8EJhR8wp8jwwb5xUQ==&ch=aVSClDxEsk6ZWgo7wf4MvcCxVomiNNNVmKMt4nMvdVMYVdPgZr6-Lw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DO9OZQVPTdFmYwuAB3osa4y762m6lcfKWWvG1lHC0JmuC1-DAMpVApADNziQ_yTbCSOQok7QachBOJfC0pLHA1YqRs17H6aBMuzExMRRaXxrgdVqKluQjHFTR11FJjTPc9T5UMITbHl0fdXGx38tSLBDaWAeubuTDZtXIhiuRwBam044i8mnRUAiwhlTyiqrJ6ONsyrEYsE=&c=cpexEYwrMAO-zS4hN_ZAVX0PPtV_7TIEAX3Ib8EJhR8wp8jwwb5xUQ==&ch=aVSClDxEsk6ZWgo7wf4MvcCxVomiNNNVmKMt4nMvdVMYVdPgZr6-Lw==).
---
| Rapid, effective contact tracing will allow us to minimize disruption and keep kids and teachers safely in school. But I want to be clear: we're not going to let people go to school if it's not safe. We're going to keep working non-stop to make sure that any family that wants to send their children to learn in-person is able to safely.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Endorsed – Troopers PBA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, This week I was honored to be endorsed by the New York State Troopers Police Benevolent Association. [As homicide rates rise in major cities across our Nation](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/YK7rYT9uvpmCzn763rhcAEwg/l2763qLTeNSnadpMW1AQ0daw), Democrats continue with their dangerous calls to defund our police forces. That's right - Bernie Sanders, AOC, and Nancy Pelosi actually want our streets to be less safe - they don't respect our police officers, and they don't think you deserve them. This is irresponsible and dangerous, but unfortunately, that is the new agenda of the radical left in our Nation. We must defeat the radical left agenda in November and work together to save our Nation, our way of life, and our constitution before the Democrats destroy everything that makes America the greatest country on earth. Unlike my opponent, Nate McMurray, I believe that your rights should be protected, that our communities should be safe, and our police should be fully funded and supported, that's why it is such an honor to have this endorsement. As long as I am your Congressman, I'll fight any attempt to take away funds from our great police officers, and I'll stand up to the radical left and their efforts to hurt our law enforcement. [By donating $10, $25, or $50 today, you will make sure that you are listed as one of my supporters who promise to stand with our police officers with me - we need every one of you in this fight.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/nSM892Pr7zLUWYudf58V0x6Q/l2763qLTeNSnadpMW1AQ0daw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/nSM892Pr7zLUWYudf58V0x6Q/l2763qLTeNSnadpMW1AQ0daw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/nSM892Pr7zLUWYudf58V0x6Q/l2763qLTeNSnadpMW1AQ0daw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/nSM892Pr7zLUWYudf58V0x6Q/l2763qLTeNSnadpMW1AQ0daw) Together let's protect the America we know and love, and let's support the people who put their lives on the line to keep us safe. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely,
Chris Jacobs

name: Team Joe
subject: We need leaders that hear us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Are you registered to vote,Peter? |
---

Peter, With so much at stake, it's more crucial than ever that we elect leaders who will fight to build our country back better. Leaders that trust science and take a global pandemic seriously. Leaders that believe in climate change and will work to ensure generations after us can live a better future. Leaders that will tirelessly fight to restore an economy where America's working families have an equal chance to get ahead. **We need leaders that hear us, and that means we need to vote. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: President Trump designates Wilmington, NC as first World War II Heritage City
body:
“There is no better place to mark this profound World War II anniversary,” the President said. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4eb9575e22&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 2, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: President Trump designates Wilmington, NC as first World War II Heritage City**

**President Trump** visited North Carolina today, where he recognized Wilmington as the first American World War II Heritage City. Today marks the 75th anniversary of the end of the war, when Japan formally delivered its surrender to the United States.

**“There is no better place** to mark this profound World War II anniversary,” the President said. During the war, nearly 2 million Americans trained for service in North Carolina. More than 360,000 North Carolinians would fight in the war, and over 11,000 of these patriots made the ultimate sacrifice for their Nation.

🎬 [**President Trump commemorates 75th anniversary of WW2 ending!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d1f03480a&e=3ee4985eea)

**In March of 2019** , President Trump signed legislation directing the Interior Secretary to designate one U.S. city each year as an official World War II Heritage City.

**Battleship U.S.S. North Carolina **served as the backdrop for today’s announcement. During the war, the Wilmington-based North Carolina Shipbuilding Company built 243 ships in total for the U.S. Navy.

**World War II veterans** joined the President and Interior Secretary David Bernhardt for today’s event. “These brave Americans raced into the fires of hell to vanquish tyranny, dethrone fascism, and defend the American way of life,” President Trump said.

**“In America,** we don’t tear down the past. We celebrate our heroes, we cherish our heritage, we preserve our history—and we build the future.”

🎬 [**Wilmington, NC, is America’s first World War II Heritage City!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4481f8562e&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**President Trump: “In America, we don’t tear down the past.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=496d648244&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Ivanka Trump talks STEM education in Michigan**

**Today, Ivanka Trump** joined General Motors CEO Mary Barra to tour GM’s Technical Learning University (TLU) in Warren, Michigan.

**TLU trains employees** while they work to earn paychecks at the same time. The program has trained 300 employees since 2017, and GM officials expect that number to reach 3,600 by 2023.

**President Trump is committed** to investing in America’s most important economic resource: our workers. Through his [**Pledge to America’s Workers**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6d9be4a7c&e=3ee4985eea), hundreds of companies are training our citizens for the high-paying jobs of the future. GM signed the Pledge with an initial commitment of 11,000 training opportunities. A year later, they upped it to 46,000.

**More than 10,00,000 masks** have been produced at the GM facility to help keep Americans safe during the global Coronavirus pandemic, and the company has nearly finished its contract to deliver 30,000 ventilators at President Trump’s request.

📖 [**CNBC: GM CEO Mary Barra meets with Ivanka Trump in Michigan**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4fa9427fe4&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump designates Wilmington, N.C. as first World War II Heritage City****** |**** September 2, 2020
---
|

---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - famous Hoosier writers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana is a cultural center with a deep literary tradition, and we want to celebrate that tradition with our One Indiana list this week. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0a451f07fec44f0b83f4c6d38c9c5779&_e=IA7D3dXbn2pmcZNhKRDUZP2g2LWGvBGDS7fcJPfLz3z0wKdd0rG2PV7QnrGt0ERw4eo_Wk1WqMDD2YQTl2mdY-BepQPkBPDKweenLa1mGyhIEZaOnaXLHJhmymyX0nfUCREaHg0FAA8lmcEMkeze4w-VtOl7kHFpojFj3S-OwnaY5bRUkO7vDV4KjJWb3AhI_qkzajQFCDNkVcTcEel2VTylYIAwfqa_X--2jRyBDb8uMw-KUgJqJUdH8rhEX0BRC0SHBKc19zvGYr1PeSzVyxeRkIJGRxAf_jiLTYh9gs__Aw3piACnHal1xjPjc8WXS4TJc5MzeVXoL1TaABuYyb9TMrHGgXuiXZF1WBWVc_84UULxVN694fGcbEVPO3uwk80HJOUb8zHKEUoVBAgR2nyFHm7f-8AqwpAW0ccqrwqovwVVONuLjavNOxiWlUEueo0ryc0XsdmnDHUpIQadhzxhAAKfR5PTHQmN5wGX7vM%3D) Friend,

_Indiana is known for a lot of amazing things — great steakhouses, basketball, an adorable First Dog named Henry, and much more. _
**But Indiana has also filled a few shelves when it comes to great American literature. These Hoosier writers know how to tell a story!**
Indiana is a cultural center with a deep literary tradition, and we want to celebrate that tradition with our One Indiana list this week. We had our crew pick out their all-time favorite Hoosier writers — check out our list, and let us know if we missed any big names! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0a451f07fec44f0b83f4c6d38c9c5779&_e=IA7D3dXbn2pmcZNhKRDUZP2g2LWGvBGDS7fcJPfLz3z0wKdd0rG2PV7QnrGt0ERw4eo_Wk1WqMDD2YQTl2mdY-BepQPkBPDKweenLa1mGyhIEZaOnaXLHJhmymyX0nfUCREaHg0FAA8lmcEMkeze4w-VtOl7kHFpojFj3S-OwnaY5bRUkO7vDV4KjJWb3AhI_qkzajQFCDNkVcTcEel2VTylYIAwfqa_X--2jRyBDb8uMw-KUgJqJUdH8rhEX0BRC0SHBKc19zvGYr1PeSzVyyfyOAvZJ_XMvylQdetirOSqIaPzFHjzErdRmp7J__FWAW2UARWvonqTMybphSkjdrgBKyvCsUdWbog-I8zxkuedTfmlwW3H6JwSbo8zsPAAdF_D0gCiVvRBRqhswfCzcmkizMmSAQhlP8DpRnyexJekv_SwM3T8XshE4wtYcq4GNEt993xEb0nraJE5Mn9ppxKBHaHalyzNGQEKPsqSTFI%3D)
* **Sarah T. Bolton** \- Considered an unofficial poet laureate of Indiana, Bolton also played a crucial role in fighting for women’s property rights in Indiana’s constitution. If you want to read a beautiful tribute to our state, check out one of her best-known poems, “Indiana.”
* **John Green** \- Best known for _The Fault in Our Stars_ set in Indianapolis (_which debuted at number one on the New York Times bestseller list!_), _Green_ is another proud literary son of Indiana. In 2014, he was even included as one of Time’s 100 most influential people in the entire world!
* **Gene Stratton Porter** \- As well as writing several best-selling novels that were adapted into films, Porter was a leading conservationist who fought to preserve much of the beautiful Indiana outdoors we enjoy today. If you want to learn more, you can visit one of her historic homes in Indiana!
* **Ernie Pyle** \- One of the most famous American war correspondents in history, Pyle won a Pulitzer Prize for his first-person wartime reporting in both the European and Pacific theatres. Tragically, Pyle was killed by enemy fire during the Battle of Okinawa. As President Truman said, “He deserves the gratitude of all his countrymen."
* **James Whitcomb Riley** \- Who could forget the “Hoosier Poet?” Riley helped to usher in the Golden Age of Indiana Literature and was a crucial part of establishing our unique cultural identity.
* **Booth Tarkington** \- One of only four novelists in history to win the Pulitzer Prize for fiction multiple times, Tarkington was once considered America’s greatest living author. He’s a true Hoosier — even serving one term in the Indiana House of Representatives!
* **Kurt Vonnegut** \- Maybe the most famous of all Hoosier authors, Vonnegut secured his place in literary history with _Slaughterhouse-Five_ — one of the most compelling anti-war novels ever written.
* **Lew Wallace** \- A man of many talents, Wallace was a general in the Union Army and governor of the New Mexico Territory as well as a best-selling author. His most famous novel “Ben-Hur: A Tale of the Christ,” was one of the most influential books of the 19th century.

That’s our list for this week — did we miss one of your favorite Hoosier authors? Let us know below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0a451f07fec44f0b83f4c6d38c9c5779&_e=IA7D3dXbn2pmcZNhKRDUZP2g2LWGvBGDS7fcJPfLz3z0wKdd0rG2PV7QnrGt0ERw4eo_Wk1WqMDD2YQTl2mdY-BepQPkBPDKweenLa1mGyhIEZaOnaXLHJhmymyX0nfUCREaHg0FAA8lmcEMkeze4w-VtOl7kHFpojFj3S-OwnaY5bRUkO7vDV4KjJWb3AhI_qkzajQFCDNkVcTcEel2VTylYIAwfqa_X--2jRyBDb8uMw-KUgJqJUdH8rhEX0BRC0SHBKc19zvGYr1PeSzVy8oJGKoCXGmFc9unXpdP8Cti7IwzptoHFAEKFVpyNFczE656XQ6UgUzt1aCu0J77t5NcFBO7ZPprK3_mo5j6pvZwGRLfPselPeyf-HSGlRFa4rWfe7TMhAOeRWyx8kBebn4r0Xf_MkoeMA_TyzSTHbFaRrJX0LTck8f39mzEw7BUjlJKaUQaAwYTFku5jpLqnfUsxjy43kJvt6WqwzjWm-c%3D) Thanks for reading,
Holcomb Crew |

subject: President Trump isn’t doing his job
body:
And we are suffering the consequences | | | |
---
|
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=4dfb10b7f5&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
| | | Friends,

American students, parents, and educators are suffering the consequences because President Trump isn’t doing his job.

Vice President Biden and Senator Harris would today direct FEMA to authorize and guarantee full access to disaster relief and emergency assistance for K-12 schools under the Stafford Act, ensuring that necessary steps required to safely reopen and operate schools during this pandemic qualify as “emergency protective measures” and are therefore fully eligible for federal assistance.

They are also calling on President Trump to work with Congress to immediately **pass emergency support funding for schools, as part of a comprehensive relief package for working families, small businesses, and states and local governments. **

This is what leadership looks like.

Help our country get out of this mess as soon as possible by electing Biden for President. [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=f7b4cf8b6b&e=3f151f8b74) what you can today!

Thank you!

The President just attacked and discredited Dr. Anthony Fauci to tens of millions of Americans.

[Dr. Fauci needs us with him now: Will you add your name to stand with Dr. Fauci against Donald Trump's attacks?](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6260/4bd7760e/545bd03b/77a804ff/3794685888/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2009/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Dr+Fauci+needs+us+with+him+firstnamenow+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200902_6MC-6MD_none_STD_3_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200902_6MC-6MD_none_STD_3_fauci")

High-ranking Trump officials are publicly trying to discredit him, the Fauci family is receiving death threats, and the Trump administration even tried to pass new COVID-19 guidelines while Dr. Fauci was UNDER ANESTHESIA.

**This comes at a time when Donald Trump implied that the 180,000 Americans that died from coronavirus ... didn't actually die of coronavirus.**

Trump actually claimed that the death toll is just 9,000 and Dr. Fauci challenged him and DEBUNKED this outrageous conspiracy theory. Now, he could pay the price with his career.

[We need Dr. Fauci more than ever -- And he needs us more than ever: Add your name if you will stand with Dr. Fauci against Trump's attacks.](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb6260/4bd7760e/545bd03b/77a804fd/3794685888/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/stand-with-dr-fauci-2009/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+We+need+Dr+Fauci+more+than+ever+mdash+An&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200902_6MC-6MD_none_STD_3_fauci&source=314_EM_PT_200902_6MC-6MD_none_STD_3_fauci")
